content:
type: STATUS
files: llama-index-core/llama_index/core/base/llms/types.py
summary: Added module-level normalize_image_bytes(image) helper (returns (encoded_image, decoded_for_guessing)) above MessageRole, and refactored ImageBlock.image_to_base64 to call it instead of inline b64encode/filetype.guess; added 'import binascii'. Should be additive, low overlap with your get_image_mimetype() accessor.
